commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content:
The winter is the time of the synagogue.
the rain, the people of the Jews, which could not look upon the Sun.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Winter. The rigour and darkness of the old law give place to that of light and love. (Origen)
After persecution had ceased, pruning became more necessary. (Calmet)
The Israelites and the world were redeemed in spring, and the ceremonies of the law were abolished at the same season. (Menochius)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
